entry.title: cf update-service command not reflecting the update in SAP BTP
entry.content:
I tried executing the cf update-service <application-name> -c 'json file' command to update the apiUrl of a service binding in an application.

I got update complete in the response, however, the concerned update is not reflected in the service binding of the application in BTP. Subsequently, I tried restaging the application, however the update still did not reflect in  BTP. Could anyone please let me know why the update is not reflecting in BTP?

 

P.S. I updated the apiURl of a service binding via the CLI

entry.title: CAP Build Code & Joule project deployment to CF
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to deploy my CAP project (named cap_bc) created using SAP Build code and Joule to SAP BTP subaccount/space. I added mta.yml file using command "cds add mta" and manifest.json file is already there in "webapp" folder. Deployment is also almost successful but at the end I am getting error related to metadata as below -

"Application "cap_bc-srv" started and available at "f*******trial-dev-cap-bc-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com"
Skipping deletion of services, because the command line option "--delete-services" is not specified.
Process finished.

Use "cf dmol -i 1f04c7e0-6111-11ef-9e05-eeee0a8230ab" to download the logs of the process.
cf update-user-provided-service cap_bc-metadata -t "DeployedUTCTime: 2024-08-23T05:33:53.331Z"
Updating user provided service cap_bc-metadata in org f0*****trial / space dev as s************1@gmail.com...
Service instance 'cap_bc-metadata' not found
FAILED
Exit error code: 1 "
 
I do not see any user provided service and anything like "cap_bc-metadata" in my mta.yml/ package.json files. I am attaching my mta.yml & package.json files also.
 
Further, is there any other way to deploy Build Code project? I am trying to deploy in regular way mostly manually by adding mta yml files etc. Kindly guide me with the steps.
 
Thanks in advance.
- Saurabh

entry.title: How to Implement Joule with SAC
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm looking for help in order to successfully add the new AI Joule to SAC through BTP, I've read the documentation so far for the integration of Joule with SAP Apps, but I didn't find it clear enough.

I appreciate any feedback or help. Thank you in advance.

Regards.

entry.title: SAP Joule connected to local project
entry.content:
I have a local service that is search powered by llm. I want to integrate that with the joule chatbot. I have sap ai core credentials. can someone guide me, how I can integrate the local code with the joule. Can we bring joule to local. 
Joule SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module?
entry.content: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module? I couldn't find any clear functionality list matched with modules in use. Can somebody help?

entry.title: How does SAP Joule works?
entry.content:
As SAP's AI capabilities continue to evolve, I have several questions about SAP Joule, particularly regarding how it works and its underlying architecture:

  1. Is SAP Joule's backend powered by SAP GenAI? Are there other models providing algorithms?

  2. How does SAP Joule handle specific transactions? For example, I saw a demonstration where it created a subaccount in SAP BTP and added a new branch in SuccessFactors. If Joule's backend is based on an LLM, how can it perform specific actions across different platforms?

  3. Does SAP Joule fine-tune and enhance large models using customer data for training? If not, how is it able to answer customer-specific questions, such as identifying bottlenecks in their finance? If so, how does it work, and how is customer data used to train or build a new LLM model?

entry.title: An error occurs while deploying the Joule capability: triggering deployment failed.
entry.content:
I followed the official documentation to create a simple 'helloworld' capability file. It compiled successfully, but the deployment failed. Previously, I successfully deployed the same capability file(see the pic2), but now it's failing again when I attempt to deploy it with a different botname. The specific execution detail is as follows:

pic1:

The error is: error: triggering deployment failed (HTTP 400 : Bad Request - File content type is invalid) (code: DEPLOY_TRIGGER_FAILED).

Additionally, I have confirmed that I am logged into my Joule tenant, and my account roles include 'das_developer,' 'das_release_admin,' and 'end_user.'

pic2:

 

Joule

entry.title: Joule enabling error
entry.content: Created a sub account and enabled IAS. tried running booster to enable Joule in the same sub account. i get below error when i run the booster.  Please note no capabilities were selected as we wanted the joule services standalone.

entry.title: SAP Joule
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently supporting a client from the German SME sector who is using the SAP ERP system SAP ECC (Enterprise Core Component) and is planning a transition to the SAP Cloud. It is still unclear whether this will be implemented as an on-premise or private cloud solution. My role involves developing an AI strategy for the After-Sales and IT departments, with the goal (for the IT department) to improve data interaction and processes within the ERP system and therefore across all departments.

I have heard about SAP Joule and would like to understand how this system could integrate into my client’s existing structure. Additionally, I am interested in how advanced the solution currently is, the requirements for data preparation, and how Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is supported. Currently, data maintenance is not in a format suitable for AI applications, which is a key factor in our planning.

Thank you in advance for any guidance you can provide!

entry.title: SAP Joule Capabilities
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently supporting a client from the German SME sector who is using the SAP ERP system SAP ECC (Enterprise Core Component) and is planning a transition to the SAP Cloud. It is still unclear whether this will be implemented as an on-premise or private cloud solution. My role involves developing an AI strategy for the After-Sales and IT departments, with the goal (for the IT department) to improve data interaction and processes within the ERP system and therefore across all departments.

I have heard about SAP Joule and would like to understand how this system could integrate into my client’s existing structure. Additionally, I am interested in how advanced the solution currently is, the requirements for data preparation, and how Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is supported. Currently, data maintenance is not in a format suitable for AI applications, which is a key factor in our planning.

Thank you in advance for any guidance you can provide!

entry.title: Joule Business scenarios - subscriber provider - IAS token issue
entry.content:
We are developing an integration for Joule business scenarios.
Here we are having a subscriber subaccount which communicates with provider subaccount and its Joule app.
We are using IAS based authentication for token exchange between subscriber and provider, facing authentication issue here. We have done the destinations setup, as well as created IAS app on the subscriber's end. When sending the request to provider's service and retrieving JWT token through OAuthJwtBearer token method in the provider service, we are getting following error:

 {"error":"invalid_target", "error_description":"Service provider has no consumed apis defined."}

If anyone has any insights or experience building similar integration, please do let us know. If there is any active community regarding this topic, please do let us know.

entry.title: SAP Joule - Navigational Use Cases for custom fiori apps
entry.content:
Dear all,

I'm working on a RISE client how is asking to use SAP Joule capabilities. I've checked SAP Help Portal documentation and there is not any information about navigational use cases for custom Fiori Apps. Is possible to find custom Fiori Apps using SAP Joule? (Navigational Use Cases | SAP Help Portal) (I'm just trying to download files on this note 3523238 - Navigational and Transactional capabilities with Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 - SAP for Me but are not available)

For example, client has develop a custom Fiori app to 'Create purchase order for Spain department' that have a custom screen where few info is filled and then application is capable to generate a PO. 

In this case, client user execute prompt asking 'Let me know SAP Fiori application to create purchase order for Spain'. Is capable SAP Joule to inform about custom Fiori app or is only working for custom apps?

Thank you so much for your help.

BR,

entry.title: Using Joule in Signavio
entry.content:
Guten Morgen Community, wir erwägen,
Joule in SAP Signavio zu verwenden. Wahrscheinlich am besten in Verbindung mit SAP Insights und SAP Intelligence.
Wir haben dazu einige Fragen:
- Ist es zum jetzigen Zeitpunkt überhaupt möglich, Joule in beiden Tools zu verwenden? Wenn nicht, ist das für die Zukunft geplant?
- Was ist bei der Anwendung zu beachten? Hat schon jemand Erfahrung damit?
Vielen Dank im Voraus und einen guten Start in die Woche.
Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
Christine

entry.title: SAP Joule with SAP BTP Trail Version
entry.content:
Hello Everyone-

I  have taken SAP BTP Trail version for few days, Can i activate Joule using this. When I refer help.sap.com

Prerequisites | SAP Help Portal  it is not clear if BTP Trial version will be supported. Please advice.

 

Also Please provide the steps as how can i do this

entry.title: Joule with S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am working on two S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation project , Is it possible I can configure joule in starter system and demo customers capability of joule?

What extra license are required?

obviously customer will ask for demo why should they pay money?

Please guide and also if you can provide document to setup Joule with S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Best Regards,

ebsor

entry.title: Enquiry about Joule activation using BTP Trail account
entry.content:
I am trying to install Joule AI tool on one of my SF demo systems given by my company. I took BTP Trial version with my registered s-user id & email .What I want to know is Can Joule be activated in Successfactors demo system using BTP Trail version?

I was unable to find Joule as a product in BTP? Can this be done?If No is there any workaround?

entry.title: SFSF Demo instance with Joule
entry.content:
Hello,

is now SAP releasing Demo instances with Joule enabled?

Do you know if partner can request them? If so, how?

Many thanks,

Elisabetta

entry.title: Unable to see the Joule entitlement in BTP
entry.content:
Hello,
Unable to see the Joule entitlement in BTP. Not sure what is missing . Where can I purchase the No cost SKU for joule. Please advise

entry.title: SAP Build with SAP Gen AI (Joule)
entry.content:
How can i create a mobile application with SAP Build App for a user to chat with Joule and then start a process in SAP Build Process Automation? EX: A field employee must deactivate an equipment for maintenance. He uses a mobile app (SAP Build App or other solution), calls and informs Joule about the serial number of this equipment ( existing in a S/4 HANA CLoud Private edition 2024) . After that, Joule starts a process automation passing the information of this equipment to an approval task of his supervisor who then receives the task in the build process automation.

Is that possible to achieve that today?

entry.title: Joule Hana modeling assistant not working in SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm trying to use the new Joule HANA modeling assistant (see https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-modeling-guide-for-sap-business-application-studio/get-answers-to-modeling-questions ) but I'm getting the following error:

"Command 'SAP HANA Modeling: Modeling Help (Joule)' resulted in an error
command 'extension.joule.genie.modeling-help.show' not found"
Do I have to add an extension to my SAP Build Code workspace ?
